theme: Reporting a Lost Item at a Hotel

sentences.english: I think I left my laptop charger in my room after checking out.
sentences.korean: 체크아웃 후에 방에 노트북 충전기를 놓고 온 것 같아요.

sentences.english: They found a black laptop charger under the desk.
sentences.korean: 책상 밑에서 검은 노트북 충전기를 찾았대요.

sentences.english: That's mine! Can I come pick it up?
sentences.korean: 그거 제 거예요! 가져가러 갈 수 있나요?

sentences.english: Of course. It's at the front desk whenever you're ready.
sentences.korean: 물론이죠. 준비되실 때 프런트 데스크에 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Reporting a Lost Item at a Hotel
